title: Is Space-Time Attention All You Need for Video Understanding?
key_contribution: Pure attention video architecture with divided space-time attention -- 3x faster to train and 10x less inference compute than 3D CNNs

title: ViViT: A Video Vision Transformer
key_contribution: Explores four factorizations of spatial and temporal attention for video classification with factorised encoder being most efficient

title: Long Short-Term Transformer for Online Action Detection
key_contribution: Dual-memory Transformer for online action detection modeling both long-term context and short-term dynamics in streaming video

title: Two-Step Real-Time Night-Time Fire Detection in an Urban Environment Using Static ELASTIC-YOLOv3 and Temporal Fire-Tube
architecture: ELASTIC-YOLOv3 + temporal fire-tube + BoF histogram + random forest
key_contribution: Two-step night-time fire detection using ELASTIC-YOLOv3 for candidate detection and temporal fire-tube with optical flow BoF histograms for verification

title: Light-Weight Student LSTM for Real-Time Wildfire Smoke Detection
key_contribution: Teacher-student framework to compress deep LSTM into lightweight student LSTM achieving 8.4x parameter reduction while maintaining detection performance

title: VideoMAE: Masked Autoencoders are Data-Efficient Learners for Self-Supervised Video Pre-Training
key_contribution: Self-supervised video pre-training via masked autoencoding -- data-efficient and achieves strong results with only ~3.5k training videos

title: Real-time Online Video Detection with Temporal Smoothing Transformers
key_contribution: O(1) per-frame update for streaming video detection via temporal smoothing kernels -- 6x faster than sliding-window transformers

title: Nemo: An Open-Source Transformer-Supercharged Benchmark for Fine-Grained Wildfire Smoke Detection
key_contribution: First open-source transformer-based benchmark for incipient wildfire smoke detection achieving 97.9% detection within 5 min and 3.6 min average detection time

title: A Video-based SlowFastMTB Model for Detection of Small Amounts of Smoke from Incipient Forest Fires
venue: Journal of Computational Design and Engineering (Oxford)
dataset: Real video clips of incipient forest fires
key_contribution: Adapts SlowFast video architecture with automatic bounding box annotation (MTB) for detecting small amounts of smoke from incipient fires

title: FIgLib & SmokeyNet: Dataset and Deep Learning Model for Real-Time Wildland Fire Smoke Detection
key_contribution: Three-component spatiotemporal model (CNN+LSTM+ViT) using sequential camera frames achieving 3.12 min average time-to-detection

title: VideoMAE V2: Scaling Video Masked Autoencoders with Dual Masking
architecture: VideoMAE V2 (dual masking for encoder + decoder)
key_contribution: Scales video masked autoencoders to billion parameters with dual masking and progressive pre-training paradigm

title: Beyond Few-shot Object Detection: A Detailed Survey
architecture: Survey of FSOD / GFSOD / iFSOD / OFSOD / FSDAOD methods
key_contribution: Comprehensive survey covering five categories of few-shot object detection including domain-adaptive variants

title: Online Temporal Action Localization with Memory-Augmented Transformer
key_contribution: Memory-augmented transformer for online action localization using selective memory queue for long-term context in streaming video

title: FLAME: Fire Detection in Videos Combining a Deep Neural Network with a Model-based Motion Analysis
architecture: CNN object detector + model-based motion analysis
dataset: Custom fire dataset with negative samples (LFDN)
key_contribution: Hybrid approach combining deep neural network detection with physics-based motion analysis to reduce false positives in video fire detection

title: Constructing a Real-World Benchmark for Early Wildfire Detection with the New PYRONEAR-2025 Dataset
key_contribution: Largest real-world wildfire detection dataset with images and videos from France/Spain/Chile/USA enabling temporal model training

title: Smoke Detection Transformer: An Improved Real-Time Detection Transformer Smoke Detection Model for Early Fire Warning
key_contribution: Improved RT-DETR with Enhanced Channel-wise Partial Convolution and Multi-Scale Foreground-Focus Fusion Pyramid for smoke detection

title: SmokeBench: Evaluating Multimodal Large Language Models for Wildfire Smoke Detection
key_contribution: First systematic benchmark evaluating multimodal LLMs on wildfire smoke classification and localization tasks

title: Ultra-lightweight Convolution-Transformer Network for Early Fire Smoke Detection
dataset: Multispectral satellite imagery + Wildfire Rescue Institute dataset
key_contribution: Ultra-lightweight hybrid model (0.6M parameters / 0.4B FLOPs) achieving >99% accuracy designed for edge deployment

title: Video Anomaly Detection in 10 Years: A Survey and Outlook
architecture: Survey of reconstruction / prediction / classification methods
key_contribution: Comprehensive 10-year survey of video anomaly detection covering temporal consistency and reconstruction-based methods transferable to smoke detection

title: YOLOv10: Real-Time End-to-End Object Detection
key_contribution: NMS-free YOLO with consistent dual assignments and holistic efficiency-accuracy driven architecture design

title: Generalization-Enhanced Few-Shot Object Detection in Remote Sensing
key_contribution: Few-shot object detection for remote sensing addressing rapid adaptation to novel classes with limited samples

title: Small Object Detection: A Comprehensive Survey on Challenges Techniques and Real-World Applications
key_contribution: Comprehensive survey of small object detection covering multi-scale extraction and transformer architectures for tiny objects

title: Vision Transformers on the Edge: A Comprehensive Survey of Model Compression and Acceleration Strategies
architecture: Survey of pruning / quantization / knowledge distillation for ViTs
key_contribution: Comprehensive survey of compression and acceleration techniques for deploying Vision Transformers on edge devices

title: Early Fire and Smoke Detection Using Deep Learning: A Comprehensive Review of Models Datasets and Challenges
architecture: Survey of CNNs / RNNs / YOLO / Faster R-CNN / spatiotemporal models
key_contribution: Comprehensive review of deep learning for fire/smoke detection covering spatial and temporal architectures with deployment challenges

title: Eyes on the Environment: AI-Driven Analysis for Fire and Smoke Classification Segmentation and Detection
dataset: 20 years of fire and smoke datasets (RGB / thermal / IR)
key_contribution: In-depth 20-year review and evaluation of fire and smoke datasets across modalities for classification / segmentation / detection

title: RT-DETR-Smoke: A Real-Time Transformer for Forest Smoke Detection
architecture: RT-DETR + hybrid encoder + coordinate attention + WShapeIoU
key_contribution: Real-time transformer achieving 87.75% mAP@0.5 at 445.50 FPS with hybrid CNN-Transformer encoder and specialized smoke-edge attention

title: Wildfire Smoke Detection System: Model Architecture Training Mechanism and Dataset
architecture: Swin Transformer + Cross Contrast Patch Embedding (CCPE)
dataset: FIgLib + SKLFS-WildFire Test (largest real-world test set)
key_contribution: Cross Contrast Patch Embedding on Swin Transformer capturing low-level smoke features with Separable Negative Sampling for hard-negative mining

title: Real Time Fire and Smoke Detection Using Vision Transformers and Spatiotemporal Learning
dataset: NASA Space Apps Challenge / Kaggle Fire Videos
key_contribution: Integrates Vision Transformers with 3D-CNNs for spatiotemporal feature extraction achieving 99.2% accuracy through temporal evolution tracking
